---
title: Assignments
---

## Course Assignments

All assignments are group projects (up to five students per group). Each week's exercises are due on Tuesday at 11:59 pm. Upload your zip file to Canvas.

Click on an exercise to download the PDF.

### Week 1: AI Fundamentals & Exploring Claude (due March 24)

| | | |
|:-:|----------|:-:|
| 1A | [AI Use Cases in Finance](exercises/1A.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/1A.pdf) |
| 1B | [Interactive Bond Pricing App](exercises/1B.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/1B.pdf) |
| 1C | [AI as a Thinking Partner](exercises/1C.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/1C.pdf) |

### Week 2: Portfolio Optimization & Claude Code (due March 31)

| | | |
|:-:|----------|:-:|
| 2A | [Tangency Portfolio](exercises/2A.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/2A.pdf) |
| 2B | [Loan Portfolio Risk Analysis](exercises/2B.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/2B.pdf) |
| 2C | [M&A Due Diligence](exercises/2C.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/2C.pdf) |
| 2D | [Portfolio Consolidation](exercises/2D.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/2D.pdf) |

### Week 3: Company Valuation & Skills (due April 7)

| | | |
|:-:|----------|:-:|
| 3A | [Two-Stage DCF Model](exercises/3A.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/3A.pdf) |
| 3B | [Monte Carlo Valuation](exercises/3B.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/3B.pdf) |
| 3C | [Capital Budgeting with Option Value](exercises/3C.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/3C.pdf) |
| 3D | [Build a Finance Analysis Skill](exercises/3D.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/3D.pdf) |

### Week 4: Verification & Agents (due April 14)

| | | |
|:-:|----------|:-:|
| 4A | [Capital Budgeting Case Analysis](exercises/4A.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/4A.pdf) |
| 4B | [Data Agent](exercises/4B.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/4B.pdf) |
| 4C | [Options Data Dashboard](exercises/4C.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/4C.pdf) |

### Week 5: Data Tools & Financial Documents (due April 21)

| | | |
|:-:|----------|:-:|
| 5A | [Financial Data with MCP](exercises/5A.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/5A.pdf) |
| 5B | [NotebookLM Financial Analysis](exercises/5B.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/5B.pdf) |
| 5C | [Stock Analysis in Colab](exercises/5C.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/5C.pdf) |

### Week 6: AI in Trading and Markets (due April 28)

| | | |
|:-:|----------|:-:|
| 6A | [Headline Sentiment Classification](exercises/6A.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/6A.pdf) |
| 6B | [Earnings Call Analysis](exercises/6B.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/6B.pdf) |
| 6C | [Build a Database Skill](exercises/6C.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](exercises/6C.pdf) |
